title: Megan Fox Totem +sound
description: The texture pack adds a new texture and sounds for the totem.
body:
# This resource pack replaces the standard totem with Megan Fox. When the totem is activated, the sound is replaced with the actress’s phrase “Get a room.”

- Suitable for both PvP and PvE playstyles.
- Version 1.16 - 26.1.2!
- Replaced sound
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3uPTtw4MlTE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
